name: Mint
unlockCondition: Government facility only, not privately constructable
calculationsAnalysis: The Mint represents specialized monetary infrastructure with strategic rather than commercial value. The construction cost of 10,000,000 ducats reflects the secure facilities and specialized equipment required, while generating no direct income reflects its governmental rather than private commercial purpose. The maintenance cost of 100,000 ducats creates a substantial ongoing expense justified by the critical currency production capabilities provided. The employment capacity of 50 represents the metalworkers, engravers, and security staff needed. The construction time of 30 days (2592000000ms) reflects the specialized construction requirements. This building creates a strategic economic asset with appropriate government restrictions reflecting the historical importance of currency production to Venice's commercial system, where the consistent quality of Venetian ducats was a key factor in the city's trading power.
shortDescription: Official facility for producing Venetian coinage from precious metals under strict government oversight.
fullDescription: The literal economic engine of Venice, the mint (Zecca) transforms gold and silver into the ducats and other coins that power commerce. Operating under the strictest security and quality control, this heavily guarded facility features specialized workshops for metal purification, coin striking, and verification. The consistent quality of Venetian currency was a key factor in the city's commercial dominance.
flavorText: All wealth flows from these walls—but never forget that each coin bears not just gold, but the very authority of the Republic itself.

locationRequirements.districtRestrictions: San Marco district only, near government center
locationRequirements.adjacentRequirements: Requires heavy security, proximity to Treasury
locationRequirements.environmentalEffects: Increases security in surrounding area, creates high-value target

constructionPhase3DPrompt: Renaissance Venetian mint under construction, heavily secured government facility, substantial stone foundation with reinforced vaults being built, specialized metalworking areas taking shape, coin striking equipment being installed, assay furnaces for metal testing, secure bullion storage vaults with multiple locks, guard stations at all access points, private canal access for secure deliveries, heavy iron gates and security measures, government officials supervising every aspect of construction, artisans installing precision equipment for coin production, isometric game perspective, stylized but detailed, emphasis on security features and precision construction
completedBuilding3DPrompt: Completed Renaissance Venetian mint (Zecca), imposing official building with fortress-like security features, heavy stone construction with minimal windows, multiple guard posts with armed personnel, secure bullion delivery entrance with canal access, main production hall with coin striking presses in operation, assay office with precision scales and testing equipment, die-cutting workshop where master engravers create coin designs, enormous vault with multiple locks for finished currency, official state symbols prominently displayed, quality control stations, ducal inspectors in official robes, historically accurate but slightly stylized for game aesthetic, isometric game perspective, sense of absolute precision and security, workers in specialized roles striking coins, melting precious metals, and performing quality checks, treasure chests being prepared for transport

soundDesign.ambientSound: Metal striking, coin counting, secure locks operating
soundDesign.activitySounds: Hammering coin dies, molten metal pouring, verification testing

seasonalEffects.wartime: Special production runs for military financing
